concept.title: Planning Phase
concept.shortdesc: Planning converts normalized discovery data into an ordered, deterministic list of action intent.

conbody.p: Planning consumes only planning_input.json. It does not read discovery output directly and does not run execution logic. This boundary prevents cross-layer coupling.

ul.li: Invokes plugin emit_actions(...) for each artifact.
Validates the resulting plan against the plan schema and invariants.

section.title: Action intent model
section.p: Each action captures type, target, reason, parameters, and evidence lineage. Execution must follow this contract exactly and must not invent or reorder intent.

section.title: Review checkpoint
section.p: Planning is your last checkpoint before execution. If targets, action types, or reasons look wrong, adjust discovery logic or plugin emission rules before you execute.
